title: Section 21
content: (1) Where the date of seniority of two or more persons is the same, the one senior in age shall be reckoned as senior to the other. 1[(2) Subject as aforesaid, if any dispute arises with respect to the seniority of any person, it shall be referred to the State Bar Council concerned for decision.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 16, ibid., for sub-section (2) (w.e.f. 31-1- 1974).
